info.title: Yummy Restaurant Management API
info.description: Complete POS and restaurant management system with order, inventory, KOT, and analytics

post.description: Upload user profile picture to Cloudinary.

delete.description: Implements safe delete logic: deactivates user and renames email to release the unique constraint.

get.description: List all valid permission slugs in the system.

post.description: Assign specific permission overrides to a user.
Authenticates users using standard OAuth2 Password Flow (username/password). Returns JWT access and refresh tokens.
Issues a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Sends a password reset OTP to the user's registered email address.
Upload restaurant logo or cover photo to Cloudinary.

get.description: Get current receipt and KOT templates for a restaurant

put.description: Update receipt and/or KOT templates for a restaurant

post.description: Direct endpoint for uploading images to Cloudinary from the frontend.
Initializes a new order. Supports multiple channels (dine_in, takeaway, delivery, room_service). Waiters and Cashiers have specific channel restrictions.

get.description: Comprehensive order listing with advanced filtering by status, channel, table, and date range. Enforces data visibility scopes based on user role.

get.description: Optimized endpoint for live operational dashboards. Returns only orders in active states (pending, ready, preparing).

get.description: Returns the complete recursive state of an order, including all items, modifiers, payments, KOT summaries, and related restaurant config.

delete.description: Permenantly removes an order record. Restricted to high-privilege administrative roles.

patch.description: Transitions an order between states (e.g., pending -> completed). Enforces business logic rules for state transitions.

post.description: Synchronizes the entire order cart. This is the primary endpoint for the POS UI to sync local changes to the server.
Registers a payment against an order. Supports various payment methods and split payments.

Process a refund for an order.

Request body:
{
    "amount": 25.50,  // Positive amount to refund
    "reason": "Customer requested cancellation",
    "method": "cash",  // Optional, defaults to latest successful payment method
    "reference": "REF123"  // Optional
}
Cancels an active order. Requires a reason and enforces 'pos.void' permission.
Activate a scheduled reservation by assigning table(s) and moving to pending status.

Override order status to 'completed' (force served).

Use case: Manual serve operations, missed KOT flows, customer requests.

Restrictions:
- Only allowed for orders in 'preparing' or 'ready' status
- Requires reason (minimum 10 characters)
- Logs override in OrderOverrideLog for audit trail

get.description:
Get all reservations (including multi-table) that include the specified table.
This endpoint checks the order_tables association to find all reservations
where this table is included, even if it's not the primary table_id.

post.description: Opens a room folio and initializes the hotel stay. Assigns nights and nightly rates.

get.description: Get a friendly and operationally-safe dashboard view for roles that do not have full analytics/dashboard access.

parameters.name: restaurant_id

schema.description: Restaurant ID (optional). Defaults to current user's restaurant.
schema.title: Restaurant Id

parameters.description: Restaurant ID (optional). Defaults to current user's restaurant.

get.description: Get complete single-day dashboard with health, KPIs, trends, and breakdowns

parameters.name: date

schema.description: Target date in YYYY-MM-DD format (default: today)
schema.title: Date

parameters.description: Target date in YYYY-MM-DD format (default: today)

parameters.name: start_time

schema.description: UTC start datetime (ISO8601). When provided, dashboard uses this exact window.
schema.title: Start Time

parameters.description: UTC start datetime (ISO8601). When provided, dashboard uses this exact window.

parameters.name: end_time

schema.description: UTC end datetime (ISO8601). Defaults to now if start_time is provided without end_time.
schema.title: End Time

parameters.description: UTC end datetime (ISO8601). Defaults to now if start_time is provided without end_time.

get.description: Returns only changed dashboard sections since the provided timestamp.

parameters.name: since

schema.description: UTC timestamp of last received dashboard
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: UTC timestamp of last received dashboard

post.description: Generates the first Kitchen Order Ticket for a new order. Triggers ticket broadcasting to kitchen stations.
Synchronizes cart changes (additions/modifications) to existing KOTs. Maintains item-level fulfillment states.

patch.description: Transitions a KOT through its lifecycle (Pending -> Preparing -> Ready -> Served).
Increments or decrements 'ready' or 'served' counts for a specific line item in a KOT.

get.description: Filtered search for KOTs across multiple dimensions (order, table, status, station).

post.description:
Request fallback printing. The caller can set `can_print=false` when it knows
it cannot drive a printer (e.g., web). This flag is forwarded so listeners
can decide whether to attempt printing.

get.description:
Get activity/event log for a specific KOT.

Returns chronological list of all changes made to the KOT including:
- KOT creation
- Status changes (PENDING → PREPARING → READY → SERVED)
- Item fulfillment updates (qty_ready, qty_served)
- Item-level marking
- Rejections

Each event includes actor information (who made the change) and timestamps.
Get receipt data as JSON

Get the strict Audit Ledger (Stock Movements) for an item.
This shows the true history of all incoming and outgoing stock.

get.summary: Get All Modifier Groups For Restaurant
Get Modifier Groups For Menu Item

get.description:
Returns JSON payload suitable for PDF rendering.
Only allowed for payroll runs that are already paid.

Get unified analytics dashboard with overview, trends, breakdown, and comparison.

Returns all analytics data in a single response for efficient frontend rendering.

get.description: Get staff performance details (placeholder - requires staff_id column).
Get kitchen performance details (placeholder - requires KOT timestamps).
Get expense spend analytics grouped by vendor (view=item) or expense category (view=category).

post.summary: Add an admin to a restaurant
post.description:
Add a new admin to the restaurant.
Requester must be an existing admin or owner of the restaurant.

get.summary: List all admins for a restaurant
get.description: List all admins associated with the restaurant.

delete.summary: Remove an admin from a restaurant
delete.description:
Remove an admin from the restaurant.
Requester must be an existing admin or owner.
Cannot remove the owner (ownership must be transferred).

get.description: Get a list of all restaurants the current user is an admin for.
Get the current day close record (creates if doesn't exist)
List day closes with optional filters
Generate snapshot preview without saving
Check if a business day can be closed

post.description: Initiate day close process
Confirm and finalize day close
Cancel a pending day close

Edit cash reconciliation for an already confirmed day close.
Intended for post-close correction with mandatory reason + audit trail.
Reopen a confirmed day close (Admin only)

get.description: Get audit trail for a day close
Export day close report as PDF
Export day close report as Excel
Get specific day close by ID
Get detailed snapshot for a day close
Get a preview of the weekly close by aggregating confirmed day closes.

post.description: Confirm and finalize a weekly close.
Rebuild weekly close snapshot from current confirmed day-closes and re-confirm.

get.description: List historical weekly closes
Get a preview of the monthly close by aggregating confirmed day closes.

post.description: Confirm and finalize a monthly close.
Rebuild monthly close snapshot from current confirmed day-closes and re-confirm.

get.description: List historical monthly closes

post.description: Create a new printer for a restaurant. Only admin and manager roles can create printers.

get.description: Retrieve all printers configured for a restaurant.
Retrieve a specific printer by its ID.

delete.description: Delete a printer from the system.

post.description: Test connectivity to a configured printer.

get.description: Get the default printer for a restaurant.
Get station-based KOT routing configuration.

Returns the latest version of the app and the download URL for the APK.
In a real scenario, these values could come from a database or environment variables.

post.description:
Get existing QR token or generate a new one if it doesn't exist.
If 'regenerate=true' is passed, a new token is always generated.
Requires 'qr.manage' permission.

get.description:
Get print/download-ready QR payload without regenerating token.
Requires 'qr.print' permission.

Public endpoint to verify a QR token and return restaurant/table context.
Used by yummy-menu frontend.

post.description:
Public endpoint for customers to request an order via QR.
Validates the QR token and creates an order in 'requested' status.

get.description: Fetch all available granular permissions (used when building a new role).
Fetch granular permission keys for all standard system roles (waiter, manager, etc.).

List all custom and system roles for the connected restaurant.
Accessible by any authenticated user (needed by the staff form to show role choices).

post.description: Create a brand new custom role. Requires admin.roles.manage permission.

put.description: Update role name/description or reassign permissions. Requires admin.roles.manage.

delete.description: Delete a custom role. Requires admin.roles.manage permission.

get.description: Lightweight health check for liveness probes (no DB check).
Deep health check for readiness probes (checks DB connectivity).
Check Redis connection status.
